installCommand: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const cmd=fs.existsSync('package.json')?'npm install':fs.existsSync('SummaryStreet/package.json')?'npm install --prefix SummaryStreet':null;if(!cmd){console.error('No package.json found in current directory or SummaryStreet');process.exit(1);}execSync(cmd,{stdio:'inherit'});"
buildCommand: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const {execSync}=require('child_process');const cmd=fs.existsSync('package.json')?'npm run build':fs.existsSync('SummaryStreet/package.json')?'npm run build --prefix SummaryStreet':null;if(!cmd){console.error('No package.json found in current directory or SummaryStreet');process.exit(1);}execSync(cmd,{stdio:'inherit'});"
